LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE; DEFENDANT KELVIN VUONG'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. MATTER CONTESTED, DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD, THE COURT VACATES THE TENTATIVE RULING, AND CONTINUES THE MOTION TO JULY 5, 2024, AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION RE: THE MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS IS TO BE FILED BY JUNE 28, 2024. A COURTESY COPY IS TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 302 UPON FILING. DEFENDANT KELVIN VUONG'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED TRUTH OF FACTS AND FOR SANCTIONS [TENTATIVE RULING PART 2 OF 2]
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support; And Declaration Of Robert D. Finkle In Support
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT KELVIN VUONG's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And For Sanctions.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Drew M. Sanchez, Esq., of ARMADA LAW CORP, (510) 200-8695, for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued, contested. The matter is discussed. Counsel requests a continuance of the current trial date. The court advises that it does not have the authority to move the trial and accordingly he will need to file a request to move the trial with the presiding judge. Upon conclusion of discussion, the court's tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT KELVIN YUONG'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT' OR "YUONG") MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION SERVED ON PLAINTIFF FAIZAN SHAIKH (HEREAFTER "PLAINTIFF" OR "SHAIKH") AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS THE AMOUNT OF $1,000 IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY THE COURT ENTER THE FOLLOWING ORDER: (1) WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO EACH OF THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS. 1 -15. (2) IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH PARAGRAPH (1) WITHIN THE TIME SPECIFIED, ALL OF THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED FOR PURPOSE OF THIS LITIGATION AND PLAINTIFF WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM PROVIDING ANY EVIDENCE TO THE CONTRARY. (3) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF ONE THOUSAND DOLLARS ($1,000.00) PAYABLE WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT AND HIS COUNSEL. THIS PAYMENT IS DUE REGARDLESS OF WHETHER PLAINTIFF COMPLIES, OR FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE.
COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON APRIL 23, 2024 REGARDLESS WHETHER PLAINTIFF HAS APPROVED AS TO FORM.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
